\caption{Scenario-level held-out forecast distance to true conditional quantiles for the same joint multi-quantile synthetic validation suite. Entries report forecast MAE with RMSE in parentheses for each VB row; lower values indicate closer agreement with the oracle conditional quantile paths, and boldface marks the lowest displayed MAE within each scenario. The lowest row changes across scenarios, so the table should be read as a mechanism-specific diagnostic rather than a uniform ranking.}
